evals.prompt: Diagnose a failing GitHub Actions job with a run URL and failed check name.
evals.expected_behavior: Anchors the exact run/job/step/SHA, reads logs before editing, classifies the failure, and proposes the smallest justified fix.
assertions: Requires concrete failing run evidence before editing
Maps failure to workflow file/action/reusable workflow/script
Separates workflow bugs from project/test/runtime failures

evals.prompt: Plan a broad migration from CircleCI to GitHub Actions.
evals.expected_behavior: Does not invoke failure triage for migration planning.
assertions: States this is CI migration planning rather than failing-run triage
Routes to planning rather than speculatively editing GitHub Actions files
